_meta.name: Nestle 1904 — John 1 + Philemon 1 (offline sample)
_meta.license: CC0-1.0 (morphology, lemmas, Strong's); base Greek text public domain
_meta.attribution: Nestle 1904 Greek New Testament (Eberhard Nestle; digital text by Diego Santos). Morphology, lemmatization, and Strong's numbers by Ulrik Sandborg-Petersen, largely derived from Maurice A. Robinson's analysis. Dedicated to the public domain (CC0).
_meta.cite: Nestle, E. (1904). Novum Testamentum Graece (Nestle 1904). Morphology/lemmatization (CC0) via biblicalhumanities/Nestle1904.
_meta.note: Greek New Testament (Nestle 1904) with per-token lemma/morph/Strong's (CC0). The full corpus is fetched on demand; two chapters (John 1 and Philemon 1) are bundled as an offline sample. Provenance and license travel with the corpus.
